trivia_bullets.text: Crash and Burn is a red instant from Aetherdrift (DFT), released 2025-02-14 on the plane of Avishkar during the Ghirapur Grand Prix. The flavor text names Redshift, co-captain of the Goblin Rocketeers alongside Daretti.

"Redshift told his team to destroy the competition. They were thrilled to discover he meant it literally." The joke plays on idiomatic "destroy the competition" versus the card's literal vehicle-destruction and damage modes.
The modal design (destroy a Vehicle OR deal 6 damage to a creature/planeswalker) is unusual for red removal: Vehicle destruction is rarely allocated to red. At four mana it is pauper-legal.
Team cohort flag: The Goblin Rocketeers (Redshift + Daretti) are the red/green team in the Aetherdrift Grand Prix. Daretti, Rocketeer Engineer (DFT no. 120) is the associated legendary creature.

related_cards.name: Daretti, Rocketeer Engineer
related_cards.note: Goblin Rocketeers co-captain; flavor text references his team

related_cards.name: Demolish
related_cards.note: same Vehicle-destruction mode in red, older benchmark

related_cards.name: Goblin Grenade
related_cards.note: red instant that converts a goblin into damage; thematic Rocketeer parallel
